arts.sum: Venezia are coming off a unexpected 2-2 draw with a struggling Juventus in Turin last weekend, as only a late penalty denied the Lagunari from a shocking win. On the other hand, Cagliari were very un...

arts.ttl: Weekend acca predictions: Five teams to back across Europe
arts.sum: James Milton has picked out five teams in action in Europe to include in your weekend acca.
